column2: Destroying one upper arm results in the death of the corresponding forearm, thereby inflicting additional %toMain damage.
Destroying one upper arm results in the death of the corresponding forearm, thereby inflicting additional %toMain damage.

Every time a Heastink is destroyed, it deals an additional 700 damage to Main (1000 in total).

Destroying the 3 top / bottom heatsinks causes the corresponding hatch to open. Throwing a grenade into either vent will instantly destroy the Vox Engine. This method works ONLY with Throwables (and snowball), regardless of damage or Demo Force, except Throwing Knives.

When the hatches are closed, they are considered part of Main.
